# willMigrateHandler

**Instance Property**

The handler to execute before the stage runs.

## Declaration

```swift
var willMigrateHandler: ((NSStagedMigrationManager, NSCustomMigrationStage) throws -> Void)? { get set }
```

## Discussion

Use this handler to prepare the persistent store’s data for the pending migration. Access the store using the [doc://com.apple.coredata/documentation/CoreData/NSStagedMigrationManager/container] property of the handler’s `migrationManager` parameter.

## Assigning event handlers

- **didMigrateHandler**: The handler to execute after the stage runs.
